pure_int.rh: Best INT-scaling melee weapon (Moonveil, Wing of Astel, Carian Slicer via staff)
pure_int.note: Staff in LH for casting while RH melee stays ready. Carian Slicer is cast from staff — functions as melee. Switch to RH staff only for Terra Magica buff.

pure_fth.rh: Best FTH-scaling melee weapon (Coded Sword, Blasphemous Blade, Winged Scythe)
pure_fth.note: Seal in LH for casting. Many FTH weapons have strong weapon arts (Blasphemous Blade L2) — RH weapon art damage benefits from Shard of Alexander.

str_int.rh: Best STR/INT weapon (Ruins Greatsword, Dark Moon Greatsword, Fallingstar Beast Jaw)
str_int.lh: Staff for spell support (Meteorite Staff early, Carian Regal late)
str_int.note: RH heavy weapon is primary. LH staff for ranged poke (Pebble/Comet) and boss debuffs (Ranni's Dark Moon). Two-hand RH weapon for tough melee phases.

str_fth.rh: Best STR/FTH weapon (Blasphemous Blade, Ordovis's Greatsword, Magma Wyrm's Scalesword)
str_fth.lh: Seal for buffs + ranged (Flame Grant Me Strength, Lightning Spear)
str_fth.note: RH melee primary. LH seal for Flame Grant Me Strength (+20% phys+fire) before bosses, Lightning Spear for ranged poke. Golden Vow from seal if 25 FTH.

dex_int.rh: Best DEX/INT weapon (Moonveil, Wing of Astel, Darkmoon Longbow)
dex_int.lh: Staff (Carian Regal Scepter, Lusat's for burst)
dex_int.note: RH Moonveil L2 is primary burst. LH staff for spell DPS (Stars of Ruin, Night Comet). Swap to RH staff for Comet Azur + Cerulean Tear combo.

dex_fth.rh: Best DEX/FTH weapon (Halo Scythe, Winged Scythe, Black Knife)
dex_fth.lh: Seal (Erdtree Seal scales with FTH, Godslayer Seal for black flame)
dex_fth.note: RH weapon for melee. LH seal for Lightning Spear (ranged), Black Flame (DoT), Golden Vow (buff). Weapon art + incantation versatility.

int_fth.rh: Best INT/FTH weapon (Sword of Night and Flame, Death's Poker)
int_fth.lh: Seal or Staff depending on boss weakness (Golden Order Seal for INT+FTH scaling)
int_fth.note: Hybrid caster — Golden Order Seal scales with both INT and FTH. Swap LH between staff and seal based on whether sorcery or incantation DPS is higher for the boss.

fth_arc.rh: Best FTH/ARC weapon (Rivers of Blood, Mohgwyn's Sacred Spear, Eleonora's Poleblade)
fth_arc.lh: Dragon Communion Seal (scales with ARC, boosts dragon incantations)
fth_arc.note: Dragon Communion Seal is the key — scales incant damage with ARC. Rotten Breath is devastating on large bosses. RH bleed weapon procs status while LH handles incantations.

int_arc.rh: Best INT/ARC weapon (Mohgwyn's Sacred Spear with respec, Occult infused)
int_arc.lh: Staff (Albinauric Staff scales with ARC for sorcery)
int_arc.note: Albinauric Staff uniquely scales sorcery with ARC. RH weapon handles melee/status. LH staff for Night Comet (bosses don't dodge) and Slicer spam.
